member.name: T:RFLTools.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:RFLTools.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:RFLTools.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: M:RFLTools.RFLToolsApplication.SpiralCommands.OddEven(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns an alternating sign based on whether N is odd or even. Used in Taylor series expansions for Fresnel integrals to generate alternating signs.
member.param: The integer index (typically from series iteration)
member.returns: Returns -1 if N is odd, +1 if N is even
member.remarks: This function generates the pattern: ..., -1, 1, -1, 1, -1, 1, ... Equivalent to (-1)^N for the alternating sign pattern in series.

member.name: M:RFLTools.RFLToolsApplication.SpiralCommands.SpiralFYR(System.Double)
member.summary: Calculates the Y-component of the Fresnel integral (Euler spiral/clothoid) using Taylor series. This function computes: Y(θ) = ∫₀^θ sin(t²) dt Used for transition curve calculations in highway and railroad design.
member.param: The spiral parameter angle in radians
member.returns: The Y-coordinate offset value, or NaN for invalid inputs
member.remarks: Convergence uses absolute tolerance (Tol = 1e-10) with maximum 1000 iterations. Returns NaN for negative Theta, 0 for Theta ≈ 0. Series: Σ((-1)^(n+1) * (2θ)^(2n-1)) / (2^(2n-1) * (4n-1) * (2n-1)!)

member.name: M:RFLTools.RFLToolsApplication.SpiralCommands.SpiralFXR(System.Double)
member.summary: Calculates the X-component of the Fresnel integral (Euler spiral/clothoid) using Taylor series. This function computes: X(θ) = ∫₀^θ cos(t²) dt Used for transition curve calculations in highway and railroad design.
member.param: The spiral parameter angle in radians
member.returns: The X-coordinate offset value, or NaN for invalid inputs
member.remarks: Convergence uses absolute tolerance (Tol = 1e-10) with maximum 1000 iterations. Returns NaN for negative Theta, 0 for Theta ≈ 0. Series: Σ((-1)^(n+1) * (2θ)^(2(n-1))) / (2^(2(n-1)) * (4n-3) * (2(n-1))!)

member.name: M:RFLTools.RFLToolsApplication.SpiralCommands.SpiralFact(System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates factorial of an integer value with caching for performance. Uses memoization to avoid recalculating factorials in iterative loops.
member.param: The integer value to calculate factorial for (must be >= 0)
member.returns: The factorial value as a Double
member.remarks: Maximum supported value is 170 due to Double precision limits. Values beyond 170! will cause overflow (Double.PositiveInfinity). Thread-safe implementation using lock on cache access.

member.name: M:RFLTools.RFLToolsApplication.SpiralCommands.SpiralFact(System.Double)
member.summary: Calculates factorial for a Double value. Note: This only works correctly for integer values stored as Double. For true non-integer factorials, use the Gamma function: Gamma(N+1) = N!
member.param: The double value (should be an integer value)
member.returns: The factorial value as a Double
member.remarks: This overload delegates to the Integer version for better performance. Non-integer values will be truncated, which may not be mathematically correct. Consider using Math.Gamma(N+1) for true non-integer factorial calculations.

member.name: M:RFLTools.RFLToolsApplication.SpiralCommands.SpiralPR(System.Double)
member.summary: Calculates the P-offset ratio (P/R) for a spiral curve given the spiral parameter angle. This is equivalent to SpiralP with R=1, representing the normalized P-offset.
member.param: The spiral parameter angle in radians (θ = LS / (2R))
member.returns: The normalized P-offset ratio (dimensionless), or NaN for invalid inputs
member.remarks: Formula: P/R = Y(θ) - (1 - cos(θ)) To get actual P-offset: P = R × SpiralPR(θ) Delegates input validation to SpiralFYR function.

member.name: M:RFLTools.RFLToolsApplication.SpiralCommands.SpiralKR(System.Double)
member.summary: Calculates the K-offset ratio (K/R) for a spiral curve given the spiral parameter angle. This is equivalent to SpiralK with R=1, representing the normalized K-offset.
member.param: The spiral parameter angle in radians (θ = LS / (2R))
member.returns: The normalized K-offset ratio (dimensionless), or NaN for invalid inputs
member.remarks: Formula: K/R = X(θ) - sin(θ) To get actual K-offset: K = R × SpiralKR(θ) Delegates input validation to SpiralFXR function.

member.name: T:RFLTools.myCommands
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:RFLTools.myCommands.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:RFLTools.myCommands.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:RFLTools.myCommands.MyCommandLocal
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to MyCommand.

member.name: P:RFLTools.myCommands.MyLispFunctionLocal
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to MyLispFunction.

member.name: P:RFLTools.myCommands.MyPickFirstLocal
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to MyPickFirst.

member.name: P:RFLTools.myCommands.MySessionCmdLocal
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to MySessionCmd.
